title: WorkDoc Column in Card View
excerpt: I have recently added a workdoc column to our board but this column isn’t available in Card views. This is challenging, we use Card views as a filter/form for what should be filled in at various steps of our process and …

posts.author: jshubert (Jeremy Shubert)
posts.cookedHtml: I have recently added a workdoc column to our board but this column isn’t available in Card views. This is challenging, we use Card views as a filter/form for what should be filled in at various steps of our process and accessing the WorkDoc template in these stages is critical.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
